name: Glow Chess
short_description: Immortal classic - a game that has been for many thousands of years - Chess - comes back in a new form, now with neon lights!
detailed_description:
Glow Chess - a variation of the classic game Chess in modern trends of neon light and cyberpunk.

Play with a friend at one computer in hotseat mode or fight against artificial intelligence.

Each time the game will be built differently - which means that you can play forever!

  • The immortal classic is a game that has been around for thousands of years
  • Simple and intuitive interface
  • Two modes - against the computer or against a live opponent
  • Neon light and electronic music on the background
